options.label: VECTOR
options.title: Split Thunder
options.description: Add one more firing lane, up to a five-lane storm.

options.label: CORE
options.title: Charged Rounds
options.description: Increase bullet damage against elites and Boss armor.

options.label: ENGINE
options.title: Overclock
options.description: Reduce fire interval for denser sustained pressure.

options.label: RAIL
options.title: Ion Acceleration
options.description: Increase bullet speed and keep the screen cleaner.

options.label: LANCE
options.title: Piercing Current
options.description: Bullets punch through one more target before fading.

options.label: SHELL
options.title: Heavy Thunderhead
options.description: Bullets grow larger and hit harder, but travel slightly slower.

options.label: FORK
options.title: Forked Wake
options.description: Widen side lanes so split shots carve a broader arc.

options.label: ARC
options.title: Storm Relay
options.description: Destroyed enemies release a short-range lightning burst.

options.label: COIL
options.title: Graviton Coil
options.description: Extend pickup attraction and collect crystals more safely.

options.label: WING
options.title: Escort Vanes
options.description: Add flanking wing shots that sweep wider lanes beside the main volley.

options.label: SURGE
options.title: Storm Capacitor
options.description: Periodically fire an overcharged center bolt with extra impact radius.

options.label: CD
options.title: Flux Capacitor
options.description: Shorten all skill cooldowns and keep emergency tools available more often.

options.label: SP
options.title: Reserve Arsenal
options.description: Increase SP bomb capacity and immediately refill one bomb.
